title: pristimera biholongii
intro: Pristimera biholongii, also known as the Bholong or Kalinga plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae, native to the Philippines. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The health benefits of Pristimera biholongii include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Pristimera biholongii can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
